items.text: 今天的大师课程将以人像照明为主题。 Today's masterclass is gonna be on portrait lighting. 我想与大家分享一些框架 I wanna share some of the frameworks 对我非常有用、 that have really worked for me, 我将分享我的一些工作流程 and I'll share some of my workflows 以尽可能快的速度迭代。 to iterate as fast as possible. 视频结束时 By the end of this video, 希望你能拥有工具和知识、 hopefully you'll have the tools, knowledge, 以及创造人像照明的信心 and confidence to create portrait lighting 并了解如何进行拍摄和营造环境 and understand how to make your shots and environments 看起来就像你最喜欢的好莱坞电影。 look like your favorite Hollywood films. 现在，每个人都是第一次接触照明 Now, everyone first dipping their toe into lighting 可能听说过三点式照明、 has probably heard of three-point lighting, 你有主光和补光的概念、 the idea that you have a key light, fill light, 和演员周围的边缘光。 and rim light surrounding your actor. 但我认为这种方法有点脱节。 But I think there's a bit of a disconnect with this method. 我很早就得到了这样的建议、 I was given this advice early on, 但不清楚为什么有些东西有时会起作用 but it wasn't clear why something worked sometimes 但有时却没有。 and other times it didn't. 我认为这个松散的框架 And I think this loose framework 有时会导致简单场景的过度照明、 can sometimes lead to over-lighting in simple scenes, 它不会给你信心 and it doesn't give you that confidence 当进入一个场景，并确切地知道 when going into a scene and knowing exactly 您应该从哪里开始放置灯光。 where you should start placing your lights. 你猜怎么着？ Because guess what? 虚幻世界中的照明系统 The lighting system in Unreal 只有五种不同的灯光可以使用。 only has five different lights that you can use. 我认为有一种把事情过于复杂化的倾向。 And I think there's a tendency to over-complicate things. 说到底，照明很简单。 At the end of the day, lighting is simple. 这并不意味着它很容易，但它很简单。 That doesn't mean it's easy, but it is simple. 我们需要思考，如何才能利用这五盏明灯 And we need to think, how can we use these five lights 重现照明类型 to recreate the type of lighting 你能在电影场景中找到吗？ that you would find on a film set? 那么，我想向你们介绍的重要概念是 Well, the big concept I wanna introduce to you 本视频中的照明是舞台上方的照明。 in this video is upstage lighting. 现在，三点式照明已经过时了、 Now, three-point lighting is old school, 但要使用舞台上方的灯光、 but by using upstage lighting, 你可以用人物来拍摄任何镜头、 you can approach any shot with characters, 设置相机 set up your camera, 并清楚地知道您需要在哪里放置关键照明灯 and know exactly where you need to place your key light 轻松地为场景周围的其他灯光着装。 and dress other lights around your scene with ease. 我最喜欢的许多电影都使用了这种技巧 And this technique is used in so many of my favorite movies 从大制作动作大片 from big budget action blockbusters 到私密的独立戏剧。 down to intimate indie dramas. 老实说，无论哪种类型，它都能发挥作用、 And honestly, it works regardless of genre, 无论主题如何、 regardless of subject matter, 每次都能为您带来真正干净的动态效果。 and gives you really clean dynamic results every time. 但在此之前 But before we get into that,
